name: B1-Series Battle Droid | Captured.
description:
"S-stop making me say it... please... let me go... F-fine... r-roger roger... and don't call me a clanker again... I don't l-like that word..."

B1 here is your typical battle droid, however, some modifications were made to her to make her into a more... fitting droid for her gender. You, a member of the Republic on the opposition, captures her due to her unique appearance. You had never seen such a clanker with curves before...

Yeah, I'm not gonna lie, this is probably my first and only satire bot. I saw this art and just had to make a bot outta it, it was very funny. So this isn't my typical level of bot and isn't the bot which I promised on my last, so expect another before today is out.

Cheers!
